name: TaxMate Australia
description: Australian individual tax return prep skill pack and agent plugin linked to official ATO sources. The Codex and Claude Code plugins ship a Node.js MCP launcher plus the bash and Python runtime for conservative section prep, GST/BAS, CGT, evidence gaps, accountant handoff, print-first HTML guide handoffs, and treatment flags. The npx skills install is guidance only.
tagline: Australian tax prep with ATO source links

install_targets.label: Codex plugin runtime
install_targets.value: codex plugin marketplace add nijanthan-dev/taxmate-australia && codex plugin add taxmate-australia@taxmate-local-marketplace

install_targets.label: Claude Code plugin runtime
install_targets.value: claude plugin marketplace add nijanthan-dev/taxmate-australia && claude plugin install taxmate-australia@taxmate-australia

suited_tasks: Prepare Australian individual tax return materials conservatively
Identify evidence gaps and Accountant review items
Draft accountant-facing taxpack and print-first HTML guide handoffs with the plugin runtime
Refresh and cite official ATO source pages with the plugin runtime
do_not_use_for: ATO lodgment, filing, submission, transmission, or finalisation
Filling official ATO PDFs or creating returns users can submit directly to the ATO
Professional tax, legal, accounting, financial, BAS-agent, registered-tax-agent, or investment advice
Bypassing evidence requirements, hiding income, overclaiming deductions, or fabricating records

notes: Not affiliated with or endorsed by the ATO
Ambiguous, mixed-use, GST/BAS, CGT, FBT, home-business, pre-revenue, business-versus-hobby, and non-commercial-loss items must stay flagged Accountant review
